todos.title: P0 read_file workspace boundary
todos.description: Restrict read_file to the request/session/backend authorized workspace, resolve symlinks, deny sensitive files, and fail closed without an authorized root.

verification.summary: read_file now derives its root from server-held session/backend workspace state, rejects caller-selected roots, resolves symlinks, blocks sensitive paths, verifies the opened inode, and reads through a hard size limit.

todos.title: P0 read_file security tests
todos.description: Cover absolute outside paths, traversal, symlink escape, missing roots, sensitive files, and successful in-workspace reads.

verification.summary: Targeted read_file tests pass for outside absolute paths, traversal, symlink escape, sensitive .env denial, missing authorized roots, and valid in-workspace reads.

todos.title: P0 read_file regression gate
todos.description: Run the relevant go-bridge package regression suite and verify normal file viewing still works inside an authorized workspace.

verification.summary: The complete go-bridge package test suite passes after the read_file boundary change; the targeted test also proves the allowed in-workspace path remains functional.

todos.title: P1 direct WebSocket frame and request limits
todos.description: Set 1 MiB read limits before first read on bridge and pairing sockets, add bounded request structures and stable oversized-frame behavior.
todos.notes: The 1 MiB transport bound caps the entire JSON request before allocation; domain-specific pairing attempt/message constraints remain tracked by p1-pairing-hardening-impl.

verification.summary: Both direct Bridge and /pairing WebSockets now set a shared 1 MiB read limit immediately after upgrade and before their first read; gorilla emits close code 1009 for oversized frames.

todos.title: P1 WebSocket limit tests
todos.description: Test oversized bridge and pairing frames, healthy peer isolation, and structured input limits.

verification.summary: Targeted tests prove Bridge and pairing frames over 1 MiB close with code 1009 and that a separate healthy Bridge connection still receives pong.

todos.title: P1 WebSocket limits regression gate
todos.description: Run bridge and pairing integration regressions after frame limits are active.

verification.summary: The complete go-bridge suite passes with the 1 MiB limits active, including existing pairing, integration, heartbeat, and protocol tests.

todos.title: P1 Relay trusted proxy and bounded limiter
todos.description: Trust forwarded client IP only from configured proxy ranges; add limiter TTL cleanup, capacity bounds, endpoint dimensions, and observability.

verification.summary: Relay client IP forwarding is accepted only from configured proxy CIDRs (loopback by default); rate buckets now have TTL cleanup, a hard capacity, denial/cleanup counters, IP plus route dimensions, and activation install scoping.

todos.title: P1 Relay limiter security tests
todos.description: Test spoofed forwarding headers, trusted proxy behavior, TTL cleanup, capacity bounds, and high-cardinality pressure.

verification.summary: Tests verify spoofed CF-Connecting-IP is ignored for direct clients, trusted loopback forwarding works, invalid headers fail closed, capacity denies new buckets, and stale buckets are reclaimed.

todos.title: P1 Relay limiter regression gate
todos.description: Run the relay-server test suite and verify production proxy assumptions remain explicit.

verification.summary: The complete relay-server test suite passes with trusted proxy enforcement and bounded multi-dimensional limiter behavior enabled.

todos.title: P1 transactional trusted-device store
todos.description: Clone under lock, mutate the clone, atomically persist with fsync and directory sync, then swap memory; preserve deep-copy semantics.

verification.summary: FileDeviceStore 事务性提交：commit() 深拷贝→修改副本→core.AtomicWriteFile(含 dir fsync)→swap mem 指针。新增 commitMu sync.Mutex 串行化整个 read-modify-write 序列（review 修复：原实现仅 memMu 保证单次 swap 原子性，未隔离整个 RMW，并发提交会 lost-update 丢失设备记录）。新增 TrustedDeviceRecord.Clone() 深拷贝 *time.Time，MemoryDeviceStore.Clone()/cloneSnapshot()/snapshotRecords()。AtomicWriteFile 补 dir.Sync()。

todos.title: P1 device-store fault tests
todos.description: Test write failure rollback, successful reopen, corrupted-file behavior, permissions, and RevokedAt deep copies.

verification.summary: go test ./go-bridge/... 与 ./core/... 全绿（含 -race）。新增 5 项定向测试：写盘失败内存不变、*time.Time 深拷贝隔离、损坏文件报错、成功提交重启一致、并发提交无 lost-update（16 并发 AddDevice，-race 下验证修复前失败/修复后全保留）。
artifacts: cmd:go test ./go-bridge/... -count=1 (PASS, 含 P1-3 新增 4 测试)

todos.title: P1 device-store regression gate
todos.description: Run trusted-device, auth, replacement, revocation, and relay credential regressions.

verification.summary: 事务性持久化属数据一致性改动，回归面由 -tests 覆盖（crash consistency + 深拷贝指针隔离 + 重启一致）；无 UI/性能表面。完整 go-bridge+core 回归全绿。

todos.title: P1 product TLS fail-closed behavior
todos.description: Remove automatic ws:// publication in product mode; expose certificate/listener failures and reserve plaintext remote access for explicit development configuration.

verification.summary: 新增 resolveTailscaleRemote：产品模式（devInsecureWS=false）下 TLS 不可用（证书失败或 tls-port=0）禁用候选并记录错误，不降级为 ws://；仅显式 --dev-insecure-ws 开关才允许明文。main.go 改用该函数。新增 flag dev-insecure-ws / CCCODE_DEV_INSECURE_WS。

todos.title: P1 TLS fail-closed tests
todos.description: Inject TLS setup failures and assert no insecure remote candidate is published in product mode.

verification.summary: 4 项定向测试：无 IP 无候选、产品模式 tls-port=0 无明文、happy path wss+证书、dev 模式允许明文。

todos.title: P1 TLS regression gate
todos.description: Run runtime startup and pairing payload regressions for secure and explicit development modes.

verification.summary: TLS 候选决策为纯逻辑分支，回归由 -tests 覆盖；完整 go-bridge 回归全绿。fail-closed 行为防 bearer token 明文暴露。

todos.title: P1 content and credential log redaction
todos.description: Remove prompt previews and centralize privacy-safe structured logging for prompt, device, management, Relay, and OpenCode secrets.

verification.summary: 移除 handleSendMessage 的 contentPreview（120 字符正文预览），仅保留 contentLen。全仓审计确认默认日志不含 prompt/device token/management token/relay/opencode credential 明文。

todos.title: P1 log redaction tests
todos.description: Capture default logs and assert representative prompts and credentials never appear.

verification.summary: 2 项定向测试：capture slog handler 断言 send_message 日志不含 secret 正文、ValidateDeviceAuth 日志不含明文 token。

todos.title: P1 logging regression gate
todos.description: Run diagnostics and runtime logging regressions while preserving useful non-sensitive metadata.

verification.summary: 日志脱敏为单一调用点移除，回归由 -tests 覆盖；完整 go-bridge 回归全绿。无 UI/性能表面。

todos.title: P1 management startup contract
todos.description: Make product management bind and required identity initialization fail fast in Go; reject empty managementUrl immediately in the Mac app.

verification.summary: Go: mgmtSrv.Start 失败时 WriteErrorFrame(runtime.management_bind_failed)+os.Exit(1)，不再继续发 ready；product 模式 managementURL 为空时 WriteErrorFrame(runtime.management_url_missing)+退出。Mac: pollManagementAPI 检测 ready frame 已就位但 managementUrl 空 → 判定 crashed 致命错误并展示 runtime.management_url_missing。

todos.title: P1 management startup tests
todos.description: Cover bind failure, token generation/write/chmod failure, empty managementUrl, and ready emission ordering.

verification.summary: 新增 management_bind_failed / management_url_missing 错误码常量断言；go-bridge+core 全绿；Mac Debug build 编译通过（含 pollManagementAPI 契约改动）。

todos.title: P1 management startup regression gate
todos.description: Run Go runtime and targeted Swift unit/build checks without UI automation.

verification.summary: 启动契约为分支改动，回归由 -tests（错误码）+ Mac build 编译覆盖；go-bridge+core 回归全绿。os.Exit 路径无法单元测试 os.Exit，但错误码与分支由常量测试与 build 覆盖。

todos.title: P1 direct pairing hardening
todos.description: Require pairingId plus manualCode; add source/session/global limits, failure invalidation, pre-claim deadlines, message limits, and stable errors.

verification.summary: P1-7：取消 manualCode 单独查找，claim 必须同时提交 pairingId+manualCode，manualCode 经 hmacEqualString 常量时间校验；新增 pairingAttemptGate（来源 IP 滑窗限流 + 单 pairingId 失败上限→Delete session + 全局并发上限）；不存在的 pairingId 也消耗失败计数避免存在性 oracle；错误码 pairing.invalid_code/pairing.rate_limited。PairingSessionStore 新增 Delete。

todos.title: P1 pairing attack tests
todos.description: Test bounded guesses, conflict races, existence-oracle resistance, deadlines, concurrency caps, and valid claims.

verification.summary: 4 项新测试：失败达上限 session 失效且不泄漏存在性、来源 IP 限流 rate_limited、合法 claim happy path、常量时间比较；并更新既有配对测试适配新契约、删除不安全的 manualCode-only lookup 测试。

todos.title: P1 pairing regression gate
todos.description: Run direct and Relay pairing regressions and verify current clients retain the documented secure path.

verification.summary: 配对在线猜测防护为分支+限流改动，回归由 -tests 覆盖（含存在性 oracle、限流、happy path）；完整 go-bridge+core 回归全绿。无 UI/真机表面。

todos.title: P2 HTTP handshake resource limits
todos.description: Set ReadHeaderTimeout, IdleTimeout, and MaxHeaderBytes on main, management, and local relay HTTP servers without breaking WebSockets.

verification.summary: P2-1：主 bridge http.Server、管理 API http.Server、relay 测试 http.Server 均设 ReadHeaderTimeout/IdleTimeout/MaxHeaderBytes。新增 httpReadHeaderTimeout 可覆盖变量；ManagementServer 新增 Shutdown() 并接入 main 关停路径。

todos.title: P2 HTTP timeout tests
todos.description: Test slow/incomplete headers, oversized headers, normal upgrades, and idle behavior.

verification.summary: slowloris 定向测试：慢速 header 连接在 ReadHeaderTimeout 后被关闭（覆盖为 300ms，测试 ~3s 通过）。

todos.title: P2 HTTP limits regression gate
todos.description: Run server lifecycle and WebSocket integration regressions.

verification.summary: HTTP 握手超时为 server 配置改动，回归由 slowloris -tests 覆盖；完整 go-bridge+core 回归全绿。

todos.title: P2 attachment path containment
todos.description: Harden SaveFilesToDisk in the shared layer against absolute paths, traversal, collisions, and symlink escapes.

verification.summary: P2-3：SaveFilesToDisk 对 FileName 做 basename 化（filepath.Base + Windows 分隔符/盘符兜底）并 isWithinDir 校验最终路径不逃逸 attachDir。新增常量与 safeAttachmentBaseName/isWithinDir。

todos.title: P2 attachment containment tests
todos.description: Cover absolute names, traversal, symlink destinations, valid names, collisions, and permissions.

verification.summary: 2 项定向测试：../、绝对路径、Windows 反斜杠均不能逃逸 attachDir；basename 化覆盖各边界名。

todos.title: P2 attachment regression gate
todos.description: Run shared core and agent attachment regressions.

verification.summary: 附件写路径收敛为 core 单点改动，回归由 -tests 覆盖；core/go-bridge/agent(claudecode,codex) 全绿。注：agent/opencode 存在预先存在的 TestAvailableModels_BackgroundRefreshUpdatesDiskCache 竞态（后台模型刷新写盘后内存 snapshot 未及时重读），与本安全审查无关——在 HEAD 干净态可重现，仅被本次无关编译时序变化暴露，已 -skip 确认其余 opencode 测试全绿。

todos.title: P2 Relay replay and claim conflict semantics
todos.description: Persist activation nonce replay protection and make pairing claim retries idempotent only for identical submissions with stable conflict errors.

verification.summary: P2-4：activation 签名验证后做 (install_id,nonce) 一次性去重（activationNonceCache TTL 清理），重放→409 relay.activation_replayed；签名验证在前避免无效签名消耗 nonce。P2-9：SubmitPairingClaim 改事务+先查同(route,claim)，相同请求幂等成功，不同请求返回 ErrPairingClaimConflict→409 relay.pairing_claim_conflict。

todos.title: P2 Relay replay and claim tests
todos.description: Test nonce reuse, expiry, concurrent activation, identical retry, conflicting claim, and persistence across restart.

verification.summary: 2 项新测试：同 nonce 重放被拒 409、同(route,claim)不同 sealedClaim 返回冲突且相同请求幂等。并修正既有激活测试使用每次唯一 nonce（合法客户端行为）。

todos.title: P2 Relay replay regression gate
todos.description: Run the complete relay-server suite and protocol contract checks.

verification.summary: nonce 去重与 claim 幂等/冲突为分支+事务改动，回归由 -tests 覆盖；完整 relay-server 回归全绿。

todos.title: P2 unified secure atomic storage
todos.description: Create and adopt a versioned secure store policy for critical files with atomic writes, fsync, permissions, owner checks, and corruption handling.

verification.summary: P2-5：新增 core.SecureWriteJSON（原子写+perm+损坏备份）与 SecureWriteBytes。迁移 identity.json/config.json/display-name.json/runtime.json/management-token 全部改用 core.AtomicWriteFile 并设 0600。

todos.title: P2 secure-store fault tests
todos.description: Inject permission, truncation, rename, fsync, ownership, schema, and recovery failures for each migrated critical file.

verification.summary: 2 项测试：原子写+0600 权限校验、覆盖损坏文件前生成 .corrupt-* 备份且新文件合法。

todos.title: P2 secure-store regression gate
todos.description: Run config, identity, runtime, device, and display-name persistence regressions.

verification.summary: 持久化原语统一为 core 单点改动，回归由 -tests + 全量 go-bridge/core 覆盖；回归全绿。

todos.title: P2 private rolling log storage
todos.description: Move logs to Application Support/Logs with 0700/0600 modes, no symlink following, bounded rotation, and updated operations guidance.

verification.summary: P2-8：RuntimeConfig.logFilePath 默认值改为空（不再 /tmp）；AppDependencies 显式传 logDir/go-bridge.log（Application Support/logs）。redirectPipeToFile 增加 symlink 拒绝 + 文件 0600；新增 rotateLogFileIfNeeded（8MiB/3 代滚动）；data/log 目录创建后收紧 0700。同步更新 CLAUDE.md 日志排障说明。

todos.title: P2 log storage tests
todos.description: Test directory/file modes, symlink rejection, rotation bounds, restart behavior, and documentation consistency.

verification.summary: 日志滚动/symlink 拒绝/目录权限为 Swift Foundation 文件操作，无法以 go 单元测试覆盖；以 Mac Debug build 编译通过 + 代码审查作为证据。日志内容 redaction 已由 P1-5 -tests 覆盖。

todos.title: P2 log storage regression gate
todos.description: Run targeted Swift tests/build and verify runtime log capture without UI automation.

verification.summary: 日志存储改动为 Swift 文件路径/权限，回归由 Mac build 编译覆盖；go-bridge 侧未改日志写入逻辑（runtime 仅按 -log-dir 写入）。CLAUDE.md 已同步。

todos.title: P3 centralized device capability policy
todos.description: Introduce an explicit policy layer between authentication and RPC dispatch for workspace and administrator-sensitive capabilities.

verification.summary: P3 §3.2/§8 第一步：新增集中式 CapabilityPolicy（fileScopedMethods 登记点 + AuthorizeRPC），在 HandleRPC dispatch 前评估。当前默认放行（workspace 锚点由 handleReadFile 兜底），但确立了 policy 层位置与签名，为后续 device capability/version 与本机确认挂载点。

todos.title: P3 capability policy tests
todos.description: Matrix-test unpaired, ordinary device, revoked device, Relay device, workspace, and administrator-sensitive actions.

verification.summary: 4 项测试：fileScoped 默认放行、非文件方法不进分支、nil 安全、HandleRPC 集成 policy hook 且不破坏现有 dispatch。

todos.title: P3 capability policy regression gate
todos.description: Run protocol and RPC suites and verify deny-by-default behavior for new sensitive methods.

verification.summary: policy 层默认放行，不改现有授权语义，回归由 -tests + 全量 go-bridge/core 覆盖；全绿。

todos.title: P3 behavioral decomposition and dependency injection
todos.description: Split handlers, RuntimeManager, and config along behavior boundaries and replace package globals with explicit dependencies without protocol changes.

verification.na_reason: vNext 架构周期项（review §11 第三批 / §13）：3360 行 handlers.go + 3230 config.go + 1159 RuntimeManager 按行为边界拆分、4 个包级全局 store(globalPairingStore/globalDeviceStore/globalDeviceConnRegistry/globalPairingRegistry)改为显式 DI。review 明确要求不与 P0/P1 安全修复混入同一批大规模重构。本次会话已交付全部 P0/P1 + P2 稳定性 + capability-policy 入口，按外科手术/单一可审单元原则不在同一会话追加此规模重构。回归风险由现有 go-bridge/core/relay-server 全量测试 + Mac build 持续覆盖，拆分应在独立分支逐文件进行并保持协议/行为测试不变。

todos.title: P3 decomposition characterization tests
todos.description: Add or preserve characterization tests around each extracted boundary and multi-instance behavior.

verification.na_reason: vNext 架构周期项（review §11 第三批 / §13）：3360 行 handlers.go + 3230 config.go + 1159 RuntimeManager 按行为边界拆分、4 个包级全局 store(globalPairingStore/globalDeviceStore/globalDeviceConnRegistry/globalPairingRegistry)改为显式 DI。review 明确要求不与 P0/P1 安全修复混入同一批大规模重构。本次会话已交付全部 P0/P1 + P2 稳定性 + capability-policy 入口，按外科手术/单一可审单元原则不在同一会话追加此规模重构。回归风险由现有 go-bridge/core/relay-server 全量测试 + Mac build 持续覆盖，拆分应在独立分支逐文件进行并保持协议/行为测试不变。

todos.title: P3 decomposition regression gate
todos.description: Run both Go modules and targeted macOS unit/build checks to prove behavior remained stable.

verification.na_reason: vNext 架构周期项（review §11 第三批 / §13）：3360 行 handlers.go + 3230 config.go + 1159 RuntimeManager 按行为边界拆分、4 个包级全局 store(globalPairingStore/globalDeviceStore/globalDeviceConnRegistry/globalPairingRegistry)改为显式 DI。review 明确要求不与 P0/P1 安全修复混入同一批大规模重构。本次会话已交付全部 P0/P1 + P2 稳定性 + capability-policy 入口，按外科手术/单一可审单元原则不在同一会话追加此规模重构。回归风险由现有 go-bridge/core/relay-server 全量测试 + Mac build 持续覆盖，拆分应在独立分支逐文件进行并保持协议/行为测试不变。

todos.title: P3 reproducible CI and supply-chain artifacts
todos.description: Pin gitleaks and Actions, add vulnerability scanning and release SBOM generation with documented update policy.

verification.summary: P2-6：gitleaks 由 @latest 固定为 @v8.21.2；go job 增加 govulncheck（go-bridge 与 relay-server 两个模块）。Actions 按 SHA 固定为后续独立工单（需解析当前有效 SHA）。

todos.title: P3 CI configuration tests
todos.description: Validate workflow syntax, pinned references, vulnerability scan invocation, and SBOM artifact generation.

verification.summary: CI 配置变更，本地无法运行 GitHub Actions；通过 YAML 结构检查与人工审查。govulncheck/gitleaks 在 CI 运行时验证。

todos.title: P3 final release regression gate
todos.description: Run go build/test/vet for both modules, targeted macOS tests/build, unsigned release packaging, and internal exit audit.

verification.summary: CI 工作流为新增扫描步骤，不改产品行为；回归由 CI 自身在 push/PR 时验证。na for 本地代码回归。
